⚔️ Kingdom's Last Stand ⚔️

Defend your castle through 20 waves of goblin hordes, trolls, and dark lords!

🏹 Arrow (100g) — Fast & reliable
🔮 Magic (150g) — Chains to 2 nearby enemies
💣 Cannon (250g) — Explosive splash damage
❄️ Ice (200g) — Slows enemies down

Click green grass to place towers • Click a tower to upgrade/sell
Keys 1–4 select tower  |  Space = pause

⏸ PAUSED

The siege is on hold...

📖 Kingdom's Last Stand — Guide

🏹 Towers

🏹
Arrow Tower
Cost: 100g

Fast-firing tower with archers. Best for picking off fast enemies like Speeders and Bats.

DMG 22RNG 130Rate 1.3/s
🔮
Magic Tower
Cost: 150g

Fires magic bolts that chain to 2 nearby enemies. Great against Armored Knights — bypasses armor via chain hits.

DMG 32RNG 115Chain ×2
💣
Cannon Tower
Cost: 250g

Fires explosive cannonballs with AoE splash damage. Destroys clusters of Goblins and Orcs in one shot.

DMG 75RNG 100Splash 45r
❄️
Ice Tower
Cost: 200g

Slows enemies to 45% speed for 2.5 seconds. Essential against Speeders. Combines with other towers for max DPS.

DMG 14RNG 120Slow 2.5s

💡 All towers upgrade to Level 5. Each level: +35% damage, +10% range. Click a placed tower to upgrade or sell.

👺 Normal Enemies

👺
Goblin
Reward: 12g

Weakest enemy. Low HP, medium speed. Comes in large swarms. Easy to kill but can overwhelm gaps.

HP 60SPD 65
🦇
Bat
Reward: 8g

Very fast, tiny HP. Zips through before towers can react. Arrow or Ice towers stop them cold.

HP 40SPD 100
💨
Speeder
Reward: 15g

Fastest enemy in the game. Low HP but designed to slip past defenses. Always place Ice towers on the path!

HP 80SPD 145
👹
Orc
Reward: 25g

Tougher than goblins with solid HP. Arrives from wave 3. Needs focused fire or splash damage.

HP 180SPD 40
🛡
Armored Knight
Reward: 40g

30% armor — all towers deal 30% less damage. Use Magic chain attacks to whittle them down efficiently.

HP 300SPD 35Armor 30%
🧟
Troll
Reward: 50g

Massive HP tank. Slow but absorbs enormous punishment. Needs overlapping tower coverage to bring down.

HP 450SPD 28

💀 Boss Enemies

😈
Fire Beast
Reward: 150g + 3💎

Appears waves 10, 14, 17, 19, 20. Massive HP, fire aura. Costs 3 lives if it breaks through!

HP 1200SPD 22Lives −3
💀
Dark Lord Dragon
Reward: 300g + 3💎

The ultimate final boss. Waves 18–20. Armored + enormous HP. Use ALL abilities + max towers to survive!

HP 3000SPD 18Armor 20%Lives −3

⚡ Special Abilities

☄️
Meteor Strike
Cooldown: 30s

Calls down a meteor on the densest enemy cluster. Deals 300 AoE damage in a large radius.

💚
Heal Base
Cooldown: 25s

Restores 5 lives to your base. Use before a boss wave or when you're critically low on lives.

🦸
Hero Summon
Cooldown: 45s

Deploys a hero unit that chases and melee-attacks enemies for 16 seconds. 85 damage per hit.

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

1 — Select Arrow Tower
2 — Select Magic Tower
3 — Select Cannon Tower
4 — Select Ice Tower

Space — Pause / Resume
Esc — Cancel tower placement
Click tower — Upgrade / Sell / Repair
Click grass — Place tower

⚔️ Enemies attack towers!
Orcs & Trolls deal melee damage to nearby towers.
Bosses deal MASSIVE damage — 65 or 120 per hit!
🔧 Repair costs 40% of missing HP in gold.

💡 Tip: Sell towers between waves to reposition your defense as enemy types change!

📱

Rotate to Landscape

Landscape mode required to play
